title: Migrate SQL Server workloads to Azure SQL
summary: Learn how to perform online and offline SQL Server migrations to Azure SQL. (DP-3001)

sections.summary: Learn how to perform online and offline SQL Server migrations to Azure SQL. (DP-3001)

Design a SQL Server migration strategy

sources.title: Design a SQL Server migration strategy

lessons.title: Assess SQL Server databases for migration to Azure SQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn multiple assessment tools that facilitate the migration of databases to Azure, including SQL Server enabled by Azure Arc, Azure Migrate, and Azure Database Migration Service.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/assess-sql-server-databases-for-migration-to-azure-sql/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Assess SQL Server databases for migration to Azure SQL

lessons.title: Migrate SQL Server workloads to Azure Virtual Machine
lessons.content_md:
Discover the tools and features available to migrate SQL workloads from on-premises to Azure Virtual Machines (VMs).

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/migrate-sql-workloads-azure-virtual-machines/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Migrate SQL Server workloads to Azure Virtual Machine

lessons.title: Migrate SQL Server workloads to Azure SQL Database
lessons.content_md:
Learn the essentials of Azure SQL Database deployment and migration. Explore its benefits, exclusive features, and migration options while optimizing performance and application connections for a smooth transition to the cloud.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/migrate-sql-workloads-azure-sql-databases/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Migrate SQL Server workloads to Azure SQL Database

sources.title: Migrate SQL Server workloads to Azure SQL Managed Instance

lessons.title: Perform post-migration tasks on Azure SQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn post-migration tasks and the tools available to configure automation, high availability and disaster recovery, and monitoring.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/perform-post-migration-tasks-azure-sql/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Perform post-migration tasks on Azure SQL

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Migrate SQL Server workloads to Azure SQL
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Migrate SQL Server workloads to Azure SQL**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
